Mantreswara‟s Phaldeepika. “Whatever effects are declared for men, they
are entirely applicable to women too. The woman‟s prosperity and
th
happiness have to be deduced from the 8 place (from Lagn, or Candr,
th
whichever is stronger). Children should be declared from the 9 Bhava and
matters, relating to her appearance, beauty etc., should be determined
th
from Lagn. It is from the 7 place, that her welfare (power of influencing her
husband) and the nature of the husband should be ascertained, while her
th
association and chastity should be predicted from an examination of the 4
